## Summary

- What changed?
- Why is this change needed?

## Validation

- [ ] `python -m unittest discover -s tests -v`
- [ ] `python scripts/package_skill.py`
- [ ] Behavior changes include representative or adversarial eval updates
- [ ] No secrets, personal paths, generated archives, or unrelated changes are included
